sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59540" key="koxlio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοχλιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κοχλίας</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Gloss.; screw</tr_> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διόππρα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.73</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.89</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
